Freerouting.command_line_help.english_value:
USAGE

  freerouting [PARAMETERS]

PARAMETERS

  -de <design.dsn>
      Loads the Specctra .dsn file

  -di <design_directory>
      Sets the default folder for the open design dialogs

  -dr <design_rules_file>
      Reads the rules a .rules file

  -do <output_file>
      Saves the board (.dsn), the session (.ses) or
      the Eagle session script (.scr) at the end

  -mp <number_of_passes>
      Sets the upper limit of the number of auto-routing passes
      that will be performed

  -l  <language>
      "en" for English, "de" for German, "zh" for Simplified Chinese, otherwise it's the system default. English is set by default for unsupported languages.

  -mt <number_of_threads>
      Sets thread pool size for route optimization. The default is
      one less than the number of logical processors in the system.

  -us <updating_strategy>
      Greedy, Global, Hybrid. Sets board updating strategy for route
      optimization. The default is greedy. When hybrid is selected,
      another option "hr" specifies hybrid ratio.

  -hr <m\:n>
      Sets hybrid ratio in the format of
      \#_global_optimal_passes\:\#_prioritized_passes.
      The default is 1\:1. It's only effective when hybrid strategy
      is selected.

  -is <selection_strategy>
      Sequential, random, or prioritized. Sets item selection strategy
      for route optimization\: sequential, random, prioritized. The 
      default is prioritized. Prioritized strategy selects items based
      on scores calculated in previous round.

  -h Shows this help

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.algorithm_t.english_value: Choose the routing engine. Current uses the modern implementation; v1.9 is the legacy comparison path.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.bend_cost_t.english_value: Per-layer bend penalty added to the expansion cost each time the router changes direction on this layer. Valid range: 0.0 (no penalty, default) to 9.9 (strongly discourages bends). Set to a high value on a single-sided or jump-wire layer to favour straight traces.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.via_costs_t.english_value: Cost of a layer-change via. Higher values keep the router on the current layer longer.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.plane_via_c.english_value: Via cost when a net connects to a power or ground plane.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.start_ripup.english_value: Starting penalty for ripping up existing traces. Higher values make the router less eager to undo work.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.max_passes_.english_value: Maximum routing passes. Use 0 for no limit.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.max_threads.english_value: Number of routing threads. 1 uses one CPU core; higher values use more cores, up to this machine's limit.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.fanout_tool.english_value: The fanout stage involves creating initial vias and short trace segments from the pads of dense components (like BGAs) to other layers of the PCB.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.autoroute_t.english_value: During the routing stage, the autorouter automatically establishes the electrical connections between various components by placing traces on the PCB.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.optimizatio.english_value: In the optimization stage, the initial routing is refined to improve the overall design.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.job_timeout.english_value: Routing timeout in hours, minutes, and seconds. The value is capped at 24 hours.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.layer_toolt.english_value: List of layers configured in the routing board.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.active_tool.english_value: Check this box to enable the autorouter to route traces on this layer.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.preferred_d.english_value: Set preferred direction of traces on this layer to vertical or horizontal.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.trace_costs.english_value: Configure the expansion cost modifiers on each board layer.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.in_preferre.english_value: Cost of routing a trace in the preferred direction. Lower cost encourages trace placement on this layer.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.against_pre.english_value: Cost of routing a trace against the preferred direction. Higher cost penalizes trace placement perpendicular to the preferred direction.

gui.WindowAutorouteParameter.routing_sta.english_value: Toggle which routing stages to run during the job.
